projects.title: BuiltByGervonte
projects.description: Rebuilt the BuiltByGervonte site into a creative software studio homepage, reframing the public identity around software, content, professional experience, and qualifications with refreshed navigation, dark/light theming, and performance-minded Next.js architecture.
projects.longDescription: BuiltByGervonte is a creative software studio homepage that frames the public identity around software, content, professional experience, and qualifications. The current experience introduces updated homepage navigation, a refreshed hero with content and software entry points, dark/light theming, structured data, regenerated brand assets, and performance-minded Next.js architecture while preserving technical deep-dives and CI/CD rigor.
achievements: Rebranded SEO metadata, sitemaps, and manifest for BuiltByGervonte
Organization + Person structured data with linked @id graph
Regenerated favicon, SVG, and Apple touch icons with proper color profiles
Dynamic sakura/ocean themes with Mantine UI and Framer Motion
CI/CD with scheduled deploys, PR automation, and branch protection
Interactive technical deep-dives and resume-driven data display

analytics.description: Tracks user behavior, page views, and engagement patterns to understand user preferences.

monitoring.description: Monitors system health, uptime, and error rates to ensure reliable performance.

cicd.description: Automated pipeline that tests, builds, and deploys code with daily scheduled releases.

automation: Auto-create PRs from preview to main

architecture.description: Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Mantine UI, and GitHub Actions for CI/CD.
architecture.deployment: Vercel with CDN + Scheduled GitHub Actions
architecture.workflow: Feature Branch → Preview → Scheduled Main Deploy → Auto-sync Preview

projects.title: Audio Key BPM Analyzer AI
projects.description: KIRO/AI generated music tool that helps music producers, engineers and artists by analyzing the key and BPM of an instrumental file. Commonly used for fine tuning autotune and pitch correction applications.
projects.longDescription: This tool is comparable in output to Tunebat.com's key and bpm analyzer. The waveform display was inspired by Soundcloud and the algorithm behind the analysis uses essentia.js. It's main use case is for analyzing instrumental music files.
achievements: AI-assisted development taking concept to deployment
Responsive design with Chakra UI components
Audio key and BPM analysis with essentia.js

analytics.description: Tracks user engagement and audio processing metrics including files processed.

monitoring.description: Monitors audio processing errors and system health for reliable analysis.

cicd.description: Automated pipeline that tests, builds, and deploys with continuous integration.

architecture.description: Built with Vite, Chakra UI, Essentia.js for audio analysis, and Web Audio API.

projects.title: Rainy Day
projects.description:
Rainy Day is a full-stack financial data platform for user-permissioned personal finance management in Caribbean markets where connected-account coverage is limited.

Statement uploads from CIBC Caribbean, Scotiabank Caribbean, Bank of The Bahamas, and Teachers & Salaried Workers Co-operative Credit Union are normalized into a canonical transaction model for analysis and cash-flow projection.
projects.longDescription:
Rainy Day enables personal finance management through uploaded bank statements as the primary data source in markets without reliable open banking APIs.

The platform ingests CSV and PDF statements across supported Caribbean institutions, persists data in Supabase/Postgres with Row Level Security, and runs deterministic financial analysis—recurring bills, income signals, spending categories, and projected cash flow with user-facing explanations and source attribution.
achievements: Designed and built a user-permissioned financial data platform using uploaded bank statements as the primary data source for Caribbean markets with limited connected-account coverage.
Expanded statement ingestion across CIBC Caribbean, Scotiabank Caribbean, Bank of The Bahamas, and Teachers & Salaried Workers Co-operative Credit Union into a canonical transaction model.
Implemented Supabase/Postgres persistence with Row Level Security, transactional upload RPCs, statement hashing, parser validation, and overlap-safe deduplication across CSV and PDF imports.

Developed deterministic financial analysis workflows for recurring bills, income/payday signals, confidence-based spending categories, and projected cash flow with explanations and source attribution.
Added parser validation and ingestion regression tests covering CSV/PDF edge cases across supported institution formats.

product.description:
Rainy Day is a full-stack financial data platform built for Caribbean markets where connected-account coverage is limited. Users upload bank statements as the primary data source for personal finance management.

Statement ingestion spans CIBC Caribbean, Scotiabank Caribbean, Bank of The Bahamas, and Teachers & Salaried Workers Co-operative Credit Union, with parsers normalizing local bank and credit union formats into a canonical transaction model.

The persistence layer uses Supabase/Postgres with Row Level Security, transactional upload RPCs, statement hashing, parser validation, and overlap-safe deduplication to prevent duplicate transactions across overlapping CSV and PDF imports.

Deterministic financial analysis classifies transaction history into recurring bills, income/payday signals, and confidence-based spending categories, generating projected cash flow with user-facing explanations and source attribution.

Parser validation and ingestion regression tests cover CSV/PDF edge cases across supported institution formats, including malformed rows, date parsing inconsistencies, and duplicate-detection failures.

screenshots.caption: Authentication flow for signing into Rainy Day
Overview dashboard with spending, income, and recent transactions
Transactions page for reviewing imported financial activity
Statements page for uploaded documents and statement history
